baseModel.name: ProxyResource

baseModel.name: Resource
baseModel.doc: Common fields that are returned in the response for all Azure Resource Manager resources

properties.name: id
properties.doc: Fully qualified resource ID for the resource. Ex - /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/{resourceProviderNamespace}/{resourceType}/{resourceName}

properties.name: name
properties.doc: The name of the resource

properties.name: type
properties.doc: The type of the resource. E.g. "Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachines" or "Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts"

properties.name: systemData
properties.doc: Azure Resource Manager metadata containing createdBy and modifiedBy information.

type.name: SystemData
type.doc: Metadata pertaining to creation and last modification of the resource.

properties.name: createdBy
properties.doc: The identity that created the resource.

properties.name: createdByType
properties.doc: The type of identity that created the resource.

properties.name: createdAt
properties.doc: The timestamp of resource creation (UTC).

properties.name: lastModifiedBy
properties.doc: The identity that last modified the resource.

properties.name: lastModifiedByType
properties.doc: The type of identity that last modified the resource.

properties.name: lastModifiedAt
properties.doc: The timestamp of resource last modification (UTC)

properties.name: properties
properties.doc: The DNSSEC properties.

properties.name: provisioningState
properties.doc: Provisioning State of the DNSSEC configuration.

properties.name: signingKeys
properties.doc: The list of signing keys.

properties.name: delegationSignerInfo
properties.doc: The delegation signer information.

properties.name: digestAlgorithmType
properties.doc: The digest algorithm type represents the standard digest algorithm number used to construct the digest. See: https://www.iana.org/assignments/ds-rr-types/ds-rr-types.xhtml

properties.name: digestValue
properties.doc: The digest value is a cryptographic hash value of the referenced DNSKEY Resource Record.

properties.name: record
properties.doc: The record represents a delegation signer (DS) record.

properties.name: flags
properties.doc: The flags specifies how the key is used.

properties.name: keyTag
properties.doc: The key tag value of the DNSKEY Resource Record.

properties.name: protocol
properties.doc: The protocol value. The value is always 3.

properties.name: publicKey
properties.doc: The public key, represented as a Base64 encoding.

properties.name: securityAlgorithmType
properties.doc: The security algorithm type represents the standard security algorithm number of the DNSKEY Resource Record. See: https://www.iana.org/assignments/dns-sec-alg-numbers/dns-sec-alg-numbers.xhtml

properties.name: etag
properties.doc: The etag of the DNSSEC configuration.

models.name: CloudError
models.doc: An error response from the service.

properties.name: error
properties.doc: Cloud error body.

type.name: CloudErrorBody
type.doc: An error response from the service.

properties.name: code
properties.doc: An identifier for the error. Codes are invariant and are intended to be consumed programmatically.

properties.name: message
properties.doc: A message describing the error, intended to be suitable for display in a user interface.

properties.name: target
properties.doc: The target of the particular error. For example, the name of the property in error.

properties.name: details
properties.doc: A list of additional details about the error.

models.name: DnsRecord
models.doc: Describes a DNS record set (a collection of DNS records with the same name and type).

properties.name: properties
properties.doc: The properties of the record set.

type.name: RecordSetProperties
type.doc: Represents the properties of the records in the record set.

properties.name: metadata
properties.doc: The metadata attached to the record set.

properties.name: TtlInSeconds
properties.doc: The TTL (time-to-live) of the records in the record set.

properties.name: fqdn
properties.doc: Fully qualified domain name of the record set.

properties.name: provisioningState
properties.doc: provisioning State of the record set.

properties.name: targetResource
properties.doc: A reference to an azure resource from where the dns resource value is taken.

type.name: WritableSubResource
type.doc: Represents a reference to an existing resource by its id.

properties.name: id
properties.doc: The resource id.

properties.name: trafficManagementProfile
properties.doc: A reference to an azure traffic manager profile resource from where the dns resource value is taken.

properties.name: DnsARecords
properties.doc: The list of A records in the record set.

properties.name: IPv4Address
properties.doc: The IPv4 address of this A record.

properties.name: DnsAaaaRecords
properties.doc: The list of AAAA records in the record set.

properties.name: IPv6Address
properties.doc: The IPv6 address of this AAAA record.

properties.name: DnsMXRecords
properties.doc: The list of MX records in the record set.

properties.name: preference
properties.doc: The preference value for this MX record.

properties.name: exchange
properties.doc: The domain name of the mail host for this MX record.

properties.name: DnsNSRecords
properties.doc: The list of NS records in the record set.

properties.name: DnsNSDomainName
properties.doc: The name server name for this NS record.

properties.name: DnsPtrRecords
properties.doc: The list of PTR records in the record set.

properties.name: DnsPtrDomainName
properties.doc: The PTR target domain name for this PTR record.

properties.name: DnsSrvRecords
properties.doc: The list of SRV records in the record set.

properties.name: priority
properties.doc: The priority value for this SRV record.

properties.name: weight
properties.doc: The weight value for this SRV record.

properties.name: port
properties.doc: The port value for this SRV record.

properties.name: target
properties.doc: The target domain name for this SRV record.

properties.name: DnsTxtRecords
properties.doc: The list of TXT records in the record set.

properties.name: value
properties.doc: The text value of this TXT record.

properties.name: DnsCnameRecord
properties.doc: The CNAME record in the  record set.

properties.name: cname
properties.doc: The canonical name for this CNAME record.

properties.name: DnsSoaRecord
properties.doc: The SOA record in the record set.

properties.name: host
properties.doc: The domain name of the authoritative name server for this SOA record.

properties.name: email
properties.doc: The email contact for this SOA record.

properties.name: serialNumber
properties.doc: The serial number for this SOA record.

properties.name: refreshTimeInSeconds
properties.doc: The refresh value for this SOA record.

properties.name: retryTimeInSeconds
properties.doc: The retry time for this SOA record.

properties.name: expireTimeInSeconds
properties.doc: The expire time for this SOA record.

properties.name: minimumTtlInSeconds
properties.doc: The minimum value for this SOA record. By convention this is used to determine the negative caching duration.

properties.name: DnsCaaRecords
properties.doc: The list of CAA records in the record set.

properties.name: flags
properties.doc: The flags for this CAA record as an integer between 0 and 255.

properties.name: tag
properties.doc: The tag for this CAA record.

properties.name: value
properties.doc: The value for this CAA record.

properties.name: DnsDSRecords
properties.doc: The list of DS records in the record set.

valueType.name: DnsDSRecordInfo
valueType.doc: A DS record. For more information about the DS record format, see RFC 4034: https://www.rfc-editor.org/rfc/rfc4034

properties.name: keyTag
properties.doc: The key tag value is used to determine which DNSKEY Resource Record is used for signature verification.

properties.name: algorithm
properties.doc: The security algorithm type represents the standard security algorithm number of the DNSKEY Resource Record. See: https://www.iana.org/assignments/dns-sec-alg-numbers/dns-sec-alg-numbers.xhtml

properties.name: digest
properties.doc: The digest entity.

properties.name: algorithmType
properties.doc: The digest algorithm type represents the standard digest algorithm number used to construct the digest. See: https://www.iana.org/assignments/ds-rr-types/ds-rr-types.xhtml

properties.name: value
properties.doc: The digest value is a cryptographic hash value of the referenced DNSKEY Resource Record.

properties.name: DnsTlsaRecords
properties.doc: The list of TLSA records in the record set.

valueType.name: DnsTlsaRecordInfo
valueType.doc: A TLSA record. For more information about the TLSA record format, see RFC 6698: https://www.rfc-editor.org/rfc/rfc6698

properties.name: usage
properties.doc: The usage specifies the provided association that will be used to match the certificate presented in the TLS handshake.

properties.name: selector
properties.doc: The selector specifies which part of the TLS certificate presented by the server will be matched against the association data.

properties.name: matchingType
properties.doc: The matching type specifies how the certificate association is presented.

properties.name: certAssociationData
properties.doc: This specifies the certificate association data to be matched.

properties.name: DnsNaptrRecords
properties.doc: The list of NAPTR records in the record set.

valueType.name: DnsNaptrRecordInfo
valueType.doc: A NAPTR record. For more information about the NAPTR record format, see RFC 3403: https://www.rfc-editor.org/rfc/rfc3403

properties.name: order
properties.doc: The order in which the NAPTR records MUST be processed in order to accurately represent the ordered list of rules. The ordering is from lowest to highest. Valid values: 0-65535.

properties.name: preference
properties.doc: The preference specifies the order in which NAPTR records with equal 'order' values should be processed, low numbers being processed before high numbers. Valid values: 0-65535.

properties.name: flags
properties.doc: The flags specific to DDDS applications. Values currently defined in RFC 3404 are uppercase and lowercase letters "A", "P", "S", and "U", and the empty string, "". Enclose Flags in quotation marks.

properties.name: services
properties.doc: The services specific to DDDS applications. Enclose Services in quotation marks.

properties.name: regexp
properties.doc: The regular expression that the DDDS application uses to convert an input value into an output value. For example: an IP phone system might use a regular expression to convert a phone number that is entered by a user into a SIP URI. Enclose the regular expression in quotation marks. Specify either a value for 'regexp' or a value for 'replacement'.

properties.name: replacement
properties.doc: The replacement is a fully qualified domain name (FQDN) of the next domain name that you want the DDDS application to submit a DNS query for. The DDDS application replaces the input value with the value specified for replacement. Specify either a value for 'regexp' or a value for 'replacement'. If you specify a value for 'regexp', specify a dot (.) for 'replacement'.

properties.name: name
properties.doc: The name of the record set, relative to the name of the zone.

properties.name: etag
properties.doc: The etag of the record set.

properties.doc: The properties of the zone.

type.name: ZoneProperties
type.doc: Represents the properties of the zone.

properties.name: maxNumberOfRecords
properties.doc: The maximum number of record sets that can be created in this DNS zone.  This is a read-only property and any attempt to set this value will be ignored.

properties.name: maxNumberOfRecordsPerRecord
properties.doc: The maximum number of records per record set that can be created in this DNS zone.  This is a read-only property and any attempt to set this value will be ignored.

properties.name: numberOfRecords
properties.doc: The current number of record sets in this DNS zone.  This is a read-only property and any attempt to set this value will be ignored.

properties.name: nameServers
properties.doc: The name servers for this DNS zone. This is a read-only property and any attempt to set this value will be ignored.

properties.name: zoneType
properties.doc: The type of this DNS zone (Public or Private).

properties.name: registrationVirtualNetworks
properties.doc: A list of references to virtual networks that register hostnames in this DNS zone. This is a only when ZoneType is Private.

properties.name: resolutionVirtualNetworks
properties.doc: A list of references to virtual networks that resolve records in this DNS zone. This is a only when ZoneType is Private.

properties.name: signingKeys
properties.doc: The list of signing keys.

properties.name: name
properties.doc: The name of the DNS zone (without a terminating dot).

properties.name: etag
properties.doc: The etag of the zone.
